creator: vladimir.nikolic@amis.net
text:
Hello,

I already have two servers (10.1 release, i386) with Intel gigabit dual port cards (82546GB and 82571EB) with very strange behavior regarding routing.
For example, default gateway is on em0, but after some time after server restart, traffic for random ip (1.2.3.4) goes out through em1. Reset helps but only until some other ip(s) has been put on wrong interface.
'netstat -nr' is as it should be, everything worked fine on FreeBSD 9.1.

Regards,
Vladimir
